frontend_ip_configuration.private_ip_add.description: The Private IP Address to use for the Application Gateway.
The Allocation Method for the Private IP Address. Possible values are `Dynamic` and `Static`. Defaults to `Dynamic`.

frontend_ip_configuration.private_link_c.description: The name of the private link configuration to use for this frontend IP configuration.

frontend_ip_configuration.public_ip_addr.description: The ID of a Public IP Address which the Application Gateway should use. The allocation method for the Public IP Address depends on the `sku` of this Application Gateway. Please refer to the [Azure documentation for public IP addresses](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/virtual-network/public-ip-addresses#application-gateways) for details.

frontend_port.description: One or more `frontend_port` blocks as defined below.

frontend_port.name.description: The name of the Frontend Port.

frontend_port.port.description: The port used for this Frontend Port.

gateway_ip_configuration.description: One or more `gateway_ip_configuration` blocks as defined below.

gateway_ip_configuration.name.description: The Name of this Gateway IP Configuration.

gateway_ip_configuration.subnet_id.description: The ID of the Subnet which the Application Gateway should be connected to.

global.request_buffering_enabled.description: Whether Application Gateway's Request buffer is enabled.

global.response_buffering_enabled.description: Whether Application Gateway's Response buffer is enabled.

http2_enabled.description: Is HTTP2 enabled on the application gateway resource? Defaults to `false`.

http_listener.description: One or more `http_listener` blocks as defined below.

http_listener.custom_error_configuration.description: One or more `custom_error_configuration` blocks as defined below.

http_listener.firewall_policy_id.description: The ID of the Web Application Firewall Policy which should be used for this HTTP Listener.

http_listener.frontend_ip_configuration_.description: The Name of the Frontend IP Configuration used for this HTTP Listener.

http_listener.frontend_port_name.description: The Name of the Frontend Port use for this HTTP Listener.

http_listener.host_name.description: The Hostname which should be used for this HTTP Listener. Setting this value changes Listener Type to 'Multi site'.

http_listener.host_names.description: A list of Hostname(s) should be used for this HTTP Listener. It allows special wildcard characters.

http_listener.name.description: The Name of the HTTP Listener.

http_listener.protocol.description: The Protocol to use for this HTTP Listener. Possible values are `Http` and `Https`.

http_listener.require_sni.description: Should Server Name Indication be Required? Defaults to `false`.

http_listener.ssl_certificate_name.description: The name of the associated SSL Certificate which should be used for this HTTP Listener.

http_listener.ssl_profile_name.description: The name of the associated SSL Profile which should be used for this HTTP Listener.

identity.identity_ids.description: Specifies a list of User Assigned Managed Identity IDs to be assigned to this Application Gateway.

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity that should be configured on this Application Gateway. Only possible value is `UserAssigned`.

ip_configuration.name.description: The name of the IP configuration.

ip_configuration.primary.description: Is this the Primary IP Configuration?

ip_configuration.private_ip_address.description: The Static IP Address which should be used.

ip_configuration.private_ip_address_allo.description: The allocation method used for the Private IP Address. Possible values are `Dynamic` and `Static`.

ip_configuration.subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet the private link configuration should connect to.

location.description: The Azure region where the Application Gateway should exist

match.body.description: A snippet from the Response Body which must be present in the Response.

match.status_code.description: A list of allowed status codes for this Health Probe.

name.description: The name of the Application Gateway

path_rule.backend_address_pool_name.description: The Name of the Backend Address Pool to use for this Path Rule. Cannot be set if `redirect_configuration_name` is set.

path_rule.backend_http_settings_name.description: The Name of the Backend HTTP Settings Collection to use for this Path Rule. Cannot be set if `redirect_configuration_name` is set.

path_rule.firewall_policy_id.description: The ID of the Web Application Firewall Policy which should be used as an HTTP Listener.

path_rule.name.description: The Name of the Path Rule.

path_rule.paths.description: A list of Paths used in this Path Rule.

path_rule.redirect_configuration_name.description: The Name of a Redirect Configuration to use for this Path Rule. Cannot be set if `backend_address_pool_name` or `backend_http_settings_name` is set.

path_rule.rewrite_rule_set_name.description: The Name of the Rewrite Rule Set which should be used for this URL Path Map. Only valid for v2 SKUs.

private_link_configuration.description: One or more `private_link_configuration` blocks as defined below.

private_link_configuration.ip_configurat.description: One or more `ip_configuration` blocks as defined below.

private_link_configuration.name.description: The name of the private link configuration.

probe.description: One or more `probe` blocks as defined below.

probe.host.description: The Hostname used for this Probe. If the Application Gateway is configured for a single site, by default the Host name should be specified as `127.0.0.1`, unless otherwise configured in custom probe. Cannot be set if `pick_host_name_from_backend_http_settings` is set to `true`.

probe.interval.description: The Interval between two consecutive probes in seconds. Possible values range from 1 second to a maximum of 86,400 seconds.

probe.minimum_servers.description: The minimum number of servers that are always marked as healthy. Defaults to `0`.

probe.path.description: The Path used for this Probe.

probe.pick_host_name_from_backend_http_s.description: Whether the host header should be picked from the backend HTTP settings. Defaults to `false`.

probe.port.description: Custom port which will be used for probing the backend servers. The valid value ranges from 1 to 65535. In case not set, port from HTTP settings will be used. This property is valid for Basic, Standard_v2 and WAF_v2 only.

probe.protocol.description: The Protocol used for this Probe. Possible values are `Http` and `Https`.

probe.timeout.description: The Timeout used for this Probe, which indicates when a probe becomes unhealthy. Possible values range from 1 second to a maximum of 86,400 seconds.

probe.unhealthy_threshold.description: The Unhealthy Threshold for this Probe, which indicates the amount of retries which should be attempted before a node is deemed unhealthy. Possible values are from 1 to 20.

redirect_configuration.description: One or more `redirect_configuration` blocks as defined below.

redirect_configuration.include_path.description: Whether to include the path in the redirected URL. Defaults to `false`

redirect_configuration.include_query_str.description: Whether to include the query string in the redirected URL. Default to `false`

redirect_configuration.name.description: Unique name of the redirect configuration block

redirect_configuration.redirect_type.description: The type of redirect. Possible values are `Permanent`, `Temporary`, `Found` and `SeeOther`

redirect_configuration.target_listener_n.description: The name of the listener to redirect to. Cannot be set if `target_url` is set.

redirect_configuration.target_url.description: The URL to redirect the request to. Cannot be set if `target_listener_name` is set.

request_header_configuration.header_name.description: Header name of the header configuration.

request_header_configuration.header_valu.description: Header value of the header configuration. To delete a request header set this property to an empty string.

request_routing_rule.description: One or more `request_routing_rule` blocks as defined below.

request_routing_rule.backend_address_poo.description: The Name of the Backend Address Pool which should be used for this Routing Rule. Cannot be set if `redirect_configuration_name` is set.

request_routing_rule.backend_http_settin.description: The Name of the Backend HTTP Settings Collection which should be used for this Routing Rule. Cannot be set if `redirect_configuration_name` is set.

request_routing_rule.http_listener_name.description: The Name of the HTTP Listener which should be used for this Routing Rule.

request_routing_rule.name.description: The Name of this Request Routing Rule.

request_routing_rule.priority.description: Rule evaluation order can be dictated by specifying an integer value from `1` to `20000` with `1` being the highest priority and `20000` being the lowest priority.

request_routing_rule.redirect_configurat.description: The Name of the Redirect Configuration which should be used for this Routing Rule. Cannot be set if either `backend_address_pool_name` or `backend_http_settings_name` is set.

request_routing_rule.rewrite_rule_set_na.description: The Name of the Rewrite Rule Set which should be used for this Routing Rule. Only valid for v2 SKUs.

request_routing_rule.rule_type.description: The Type of Routing that should be used for this Rule. Possible values are `Basic` and `PathBasedRouting`.

request_routing_rule.url_path_map_name.description: The Name of the URL Path Map which should be associated with this Routing Rule.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which to the Application Gateway should exist

response_header_configuration.header_nam.description: Header name of the header configuration.

response_header_configuration.header_val.description: Header value of the header configuration. To delete a response header set this property to an empty string.

rewrite_rule.condition.description: One or more `condition` blocks as defined above.

rewrite_rule.name.description: Unique name of the rewrite rule block

rewrite_rule.request_header_configuratio.description: One or more `request_header_configuration` blocks as defined above.

rewrite_rule.response_header_configurati.description: One or more `response_header_configuration` blocks as defined above.

rewrite_rule.rule_sequence.description: Rule sequence of the rewrite rule that determines the order of execution in a set.

rewrite_rule_set.description: One or more `rewrite_rule_set` blocks as defined below. Only valid for v2 WAF and Standard SKUs.

rewrite_rule_set.name.description: Unique name of the rewrite rule set block

rewrite_rule_set.rewrite_rule.description: One or more `rewrite_rule` blocks as defined below.

sku.description: A `sku` block as defined below.

sku.capacity.description: The Capacity of the SKU to use for this Application Gateway. When using a V1 SKU this value must be between `1` and `32`, and `1` to `125` for a V2 SKU. When using a `Basic` SKU this property must be between `1` and `2`. This property is optional if `autoscale_configuration` is set.

sku.name.description: The Name of the SKU to use for this Application Gateway. Possible values are `Basic`, `Standard_Small`, `Standard_Medium`, `Standard_Large`, `Standard_v2`, `WAF_Large`, `WAF_Medium` and `WAF_v2`.

sku.tier.description: The Tier of the SKU to use for this Application Gateway. Possible values are `Basic`, `Standard`, `Standard_v2`, `WAF`, and `WAF_v2`.

ssl_certificate.description: One or more `ssl_certificate` blocks as defined below.

ssl_certificate.data.description: The base64-encoded PFX certificate data. Required if `key_vault_secret_id` is not set.

ssl_certificate.key_vault_secret_id.description: The Secret ID of the (base-64 encoded unencrypted pfx) `Secret` or `Certificate` object stored in Azure KeyVault. You need to enable soft delete for Key Vault to use this feature. Required if `data` is not set.

ssl_certificate.name.description: The Name of the SSL certificate that is unique within this Application Gateway

ssl_certificate.password.description: Password for the pfx file specified in data. Required if `data` is set.

ssl_policy.cipher_suites.description: A List of accepted cipher suites. Possible values are: `TLS_DHE_DSS_WITH_3DES_EDE_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_DHE_DSS_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_DHE_DSS_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256`, `TLS_DHE_DSS_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_DHE_DSS_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA256`, `TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256`, `TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384`, `TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256`, `TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256`, `TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384`, `TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384`, `TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256`, `TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256`, `TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384`, `TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384`, `TLS_RSA_WITH_3DES_EDE_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256`, `TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256`, `TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA`, `TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA256` and `TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384`.

ssl_policy.disabled_protocols.description: A list of SSL Protocols which should be disabled on this Application Gateway. Possible values are `TLSv1_0`, `TLSv1_1`, `TLSv1_2` and `TLSv1_3`.

ssl_policy.min_protocol_version.description: The minimal TLS version. Possible values are `TLSv1_0`, `TLSv1_1`, `TLSv1_2` and `TLSv1_3`.

ssl_policy.policy_name.description: The Name of the Policy e.g. AppGwSslPolicy20170401S. Required if `policy_type` is set to `Predefined`. Possible values can change over time and are published here <https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/application-gateway/application-gateway-ssl-policy-overview>. Not compatible with `disabled_protocols`.

ssl_policy.policy_type.description: The Type of the Policy. Possible values are `Predefined`, `Custom` and `CustomV2`.

ssl_profile.description: One or more `ssl_profile` blocks as defined below.

ssl_profile.name.description: The name of the SSL Profile that is unique within this Application Gateway.

ssl_profile.trusted_client_certificate_n.description: The name of the Trusted Client Certificate that will be used to authenticate requests from clients.

ssl_profile.verify_client_certificate_is.description: Should client certificate issuer DN be verified? Defaults to `false`.

ssl_profile.verify_client_certificate_re.description: Specify the method to check client certificate revocation status. Possible value is `OCSP`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

trusted_client_certificate.description: One or more `trusted_client_certificate` blocks as defined below.

trusted_client_certificate.name.description: The name of the Trusted Client Certificate that is unique within this Application Gateway.

trusted_root_certificate.description: One or more `trusted_root_certificate` blocks as defined below.

trusted_root_certificate.data.description: The contents of the Trusted Root Certificate which should be used. Required if `key_vault_secret_id` is not set.

trusted_root_certificate.key_vault_secre.description: The Secret ID of the (base-64 encoded unencrypted pfx) `Secret` or `Certificate` object stored in Azure KeyVault. You need to enable soft delete for the Key Vault to use this feature. Required if `data` is not set.

trusted_root_certificate.name.description: The Name of the Trusted Root Certificate to use.

url.components.description: The components used to rewrite the URL. Possible values are `path_only` and `query_string_only` to limit the rewrite to the URL Path or URL Query String only.

url.reroute.description: Whether the URL path map should be reevaluated after this rewrite has been applied. [More info on rewrite configuration](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/application-gateway/rewrite-http-headers-url#rewrite-configuration)

url_path_map.description: One or more `url_path_map` blocks as defined below.

url_path_map.default_backend_address_poo.description: The Name of the Default Backend Address Pool which should be used for this URL Path Map. Cannot be set if `default_redirect_configuration_name` is set.

url_path_map.default_backend_http_settin.description: The Name of the Default Backend HTTP Settings Collection which should be used for this URL Path Map. Cannot be set if `default_redirect_configuration_name` is set.

url_path_map.default_redirect_configurat.description: The Name of the Default Redirect Configuration which should be used for this URL Path Map. Cannot be set if either `default_backend_address_pool_name` or `default_backend_http_settings_name` is set.

url_path_map.default_rewrite_rule_set_na.description: The Name of the Default Rewrite Rule Set which should be used for this URL Path Map. Only valid for v2 SKUs.

url_path_map.name.description: The Name of the URL Path Map.

url_path_map.path_rule.description: One or more `path_rule` blocks as defined above.

waf_configuration.disabled_rule_group.description: One or more `disabled_rule_group` blocks as defined below.

waf_configuration.enabled.description: Is the Web Application Firewall enabled?

waf_configuration.exclusion.description: One or more `exclusion` blocks as defined below.

waf_configuration.file_upload_limit_mb.description: The File Upload Limit in MB. Accepted values are in the range `1`MB to `750`MB for the `WAF_v2` SKU, and `1`MB to `500`MB for all other SKUs. Defaults to `100`MB.

waf_configuration.firewall_mode.description: The Web Application Firewall Mode. Possible values are `Detection` and `Prevention`.

waf_configuration.max_request_body_size_.description: The Maximum Request Body Size in KB. Accepted values are in the range `1`KB to `128`KB. Defaults to `128`KB.

waf_configuration.request_body_check.description: Is Request Body Inspection enabled? Defaults to `true`.

waf_configuration.rule_set_type.description: The Type of the Rule Set used for this Web Application Firewall. Possible values are `OWASP`, `Microsoft_BotManagerRuleSet` and `Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet`. Defaults to `OWASP`.

waf_configuration.rule_set_version.description: The Version of the Rule Set used for this Web Application Firewall. Possible values are `0.1`, `1.0`, `1.1`, `2.1`, `2.2`, `2.2.9`, `3.0`, `3.1` and `3.2`.

zones.description: Specifies a list of Availability Zones in which this Application Gateway should be located. Changing this forces a new Application Gateway to be created.

application_type.description: Specifies the type of Application Insights to create. Valid values are `ios` for _iOS_, `java` for _Java web_, `MobileCenter` for _App Center_, `Node.JS` for _Node.js_, `other` for _General_, `phone` for _Windows Phone_, `store` for _Windows Store_ and `web` for _ASP.NET_. Please note these values are case sensitive; unmatched values are treated as _ASP.NET_ by Azure

daily_data_cap_in_gb.description: Specifies the Application Insights component daily data volume cap in GB. Defaults to `100`.

daily_data_cap_notifications_disabled.description: Specifies if a notification email will be sent when the daily data volume cap is met. Defaults to `false`.

disable_ip_masking.description: By default the real client IP is masked as `0.0.0.0` in the logs. Use this argument to disable masking and log the real client IP. Defaults to `false`.

force_customer_storage_for_profiler.description: Should the Application Insights component force users to create their own storage account for profiling? Defaults to `false`.

internet_ingestion_enabled.description: Should the Application Insights component support ingestion over the Public Internet? Defaults to `true`.

internet_query_enabled.description: Should the Application Insights component support querying over the Public Internet? Defaults to `true`.

local_authentication_disabled.description: Disable Non-Azure AD based Auth. Defaults to `false`.

location.description: Specifies the supported Azure location where the resource exists

name.description: Specifies the name of the Application Insights component

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which to create the Application Insights component

retention_in_days.description: Specifies the retention period in days. Possible values are `30`, `60`, `90`, `120`, `180`, `270`, `365`, `550` or `730`. Defaults to `90`.

sampling_percentage.description: Specifies the percentage of the data produced by the monitored application that is sampled for Application Insights telemetry. Defaults to `100`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

workspace_id.description: Specifies the id of a log analytics workspace resource.

application_insights_id.description: The ID of the Application Insights component on which the Analytics Item exists

content.description: The content for the Analytics Item, for example the query text if `type` is `query`.

function_alias.description: The alias to use for the function. Required when `type` is `function`.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Application Insights Analytics Item

scope.description: The scope for the Analytics Item. Can be `shared` or `user`

type.description: The type of Analytics Item to create. Can be one of `query`, `function`, `folder`, `recent`

application_insights_id.description: The ID of the Application Insights component on which the API key operates

name.description: Specifies the name of the Application Insights API key

read_permissions.description: Specifies the list of read permissions granted to the API key. Valid values are `agentconfig`, `aggregate`, `api`, `draft`, `extendqueries`, `search`. Please note these values are case sensitive

write_permissions.description: Specifies the list of write permissions granted to the API key. Valid values are `annotations`. Please note these values are case sensitive

additional_email_recipients.description: Specifies a list of additional recipients that will be sent emails on this Application Insights Smart Detection Rule.

application_insights_id.description: The ID of the Application Insights component on which the Smart Detection Rule operates

enabled.description: Is the Application Insights Smart Detection Rule enabled? Defaults to `true`.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Application Insights Smart Detection Rule. Valid values include `Slow page load time`, `Slow server response time`, `Potential memory leak detected`, `Potential security issue detected`, `Long dependency duration`, `Degradation in server response time`, `Degradation in dependency duration`, `Degradation in trace severity ratio`, `Abnormal rise in exception volume`, `Abnormal rise in daily data volume`

send_emails_to_subscription_owners.description: Do emails get sent to subscription owners? Defaults to `true`.

application_insights_id.description: The ID of the Application Insights instance on which the WebTest operates. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Standard WebTest to be created.

content.content_match.description: A string value containing the content to match on.

content.ignore_case.description: Ignore the casing in the `content_match` value.

content.pass_if_text_found.description: If the content of `content_match` is found, pass the test. If set to `false`, the WebTest is failing if the content of `content_match` is found.

description.description: Purpose/user defined descriptive test for this WebTest.

enabled.description: Should the WebTest be enabled?

frequency.description: Interval in seconds between test runs for this WebTest. Valid options are `300`, `600` and `900`. Defaults to `300`.

geo_locations.description: Specifies a list of where to physically run the tests from to give global coverage for accessibility of your application.

header.name.description: The name which should be used for a header in the request.

header.value.description: The value which should be used for a header in the request.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Application Insights Standard WebTest should exist. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Standard WebTest to be created. It needs to correlate with location of the parent resource (azurerm_application_insights)

name.description: The name which should be used for this Application Insights Standard WebTest. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Standard WebTest to be created.

request.follow_redirects_enabled.description: Should the following of redirects be enabled? Defaults to `true`.

request.header.description: One or more `header` blocks as defined above.

request.http_verb.description: Which HTTP verb to use for the call. Options are 'GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE', 'HEAD', and 'OPTIONS'. Defaults to `GET`.

request.parse_dependent_requests_enabled.description: Should the parsing of dependend requests be enabled? Defaults to `true`.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Application Insights Standard WebTest should exist. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Standard WebTest to be created.

retry_enabled.description: Should the retry on WebTest failure be enabled?

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Application Insights Standard WebTest.

timeout.description: Seconds until this WebTest will timeout and fail. Default is `30`.

validation_rules.expected_status_code.description: The expected status code of the response. Default is '200', '0' means 'response code < 400'

validation_rules.ssl_cert_remaining_life.description: The number of days of SSL certificate validity remaining for the checked endpoint. If the certificate has a shorter remaining lifetime left, the test will fail. This number should be between 1 and 365.

validation_rules.ssl_check_enabled.description: Should the SSL check be enabled?

application_insights_id.description: The ID of the Application Insights component on which the WebTest operates

configuration.description: An XML configuration specification for a WebTest ([see here for more information](https://docs.microsoft.com/rest/api/application-insights/webtests/createorupdate/)).

description.description: Purpose/user defined descriptive test for this WebTest.

enabled.description: Is the test actively being monitored.

frequency.description: Interval in seconds between test runs for this WebTest. Valid options are `300`, `600` and `900`. Defaults to `300`.

geo_locations.description: A list of where to physically run the tests from to give global coverage for accessibility of your application.

kind.description: The kind of web test that this web test watches. Choices are `ping` and `multistep`

location.description: Specifies the supported Azure location where the resource exists

name.description: Specifies the name of the Application Insights WebTest

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which to create the Application Insights WebTest. Changing this forces a new resource

retry_enabled.description: Allow for retries should this WebTest fail.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

timeout.description: Seconds until this WebTest will timeout and fail. Default is `30`.

category.description: Workbook category, as defined by the user at creation time. There may be additional category types beyond the following: `workbook`, `sentinel`. Defaults to `workbook`.

data_json.description: Configuration of this particular workbook. Configuration data is a string containing valid JSON.

description.description: Specifies the description of the workbook.

display_name.description: Specifies the user-defined name (display name) of the workbook.

identity.description: An `identity` block as defined below. Changing this forces a new Workbook to be created.

identity.identity_ids.description: The list of User Assigned Managed Identity IDs assigned to this Workbook

identity.type.description: The type of Managed Service Identity that is configured on this Workbook. Possible values are `UserAssigned`, `SystemAssigned` and `SystemAssigned, UserAssigned`

location.description: Specifies the Azure Region where the Workbook should exist. Changing this forces a new Workbook to be created.

name.description: Specifies the name of this Workbook as a UUID/GUID. It should not contain any uppercase letters. Changing this forces a new Workbook to be created.

resource_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the Resource Group where the Workbook should exist. Changing this forces a new Workbook to be created.

source_id.description: Resource ID for a source resource. It should not contain any uppercase letters. Defaults to `azure monitor`.

storage_container_id.description: Specifies the Resource Manager ID of the Storage Container when bring your own storage is used. Changing this forces a new Workbook to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Workbook.

author.description: Information about the author of the workbook template.

galleries.name.description: Name of the workbook template in the gallery.

galleries.order.description: Order of the template within the gallery. Defaults to `0`.

galleries.resource_type.description: Azure resource type supported by the gallery. Defaults to `Azure Monitor`.

galleries.type.description: Type of workbook supported by the workbook template. Defaults to `workbook`.

localized.description: Key value pairs of localized gallery. Each key is the locale code of languages supported by the Azure portal.

location.description: Specifies the Azure Region where the Application Insights Workbook Template should exist. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Workbook Template to be created.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Application Insights Workbook Template. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Workbook Template to be created.

priority.description: Priority of the template. Determines which template to open when a workbook gallery is opened in viewer mode. Defaults to `0`.

resource_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the Resource Group where the Application Insights Workbook Template should exist. Changing this forces a new Application Insights Workbook Template to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Application Insights Workbook Template.

template_data.description: Valid JSON object containing workbook template payload.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Application Gateway for Containers (ALB)

resource_group_name.description: The name of Resource Group where the Application Gateway for Containers (ALB) should exist

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Application Gateway for Containers (ALB).

name.description: The name which should be used for this Application Gateway for Containers Frontend

application_load_balancer_id.description: The ID of the Application Load Balancer. Changing this forces a new Application Gateway for Containers Security Policy to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Application Load Balancer Security Policy. Changing this forces a new Application Load Balancer Security Policy to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Application Load Balancer Security Policy.

web_application_firewall_policy_id.description: The ID of the Web Application Firewall Policy. Changing this forces a new Application Load Balancer Security Policy to be created.

agent_public_key_certificate.description: Specifies the base64-encoded public certificate used by the agent to do the initial handshake to the backend services in Azure. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster to be created.

identity.description: An `identity` block as defined below. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster to be created.

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity assigned to this Arc Kubernetes Cluster. At this time the only possible value is `SystemAssigned`

location.description: Specifies the Azure Region where the Arc Kubernetes Cluster should exist. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster to be created.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Arc Kubernetes Cluster. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster to be created.

resource_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the Resource Group where the Arc Kubernetes Cluster should exist. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Arc Kubernetes Cluster.

cluster_id.description: Specifies the Cluster ID. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

configuration_protected_settings.description: Configuration settings that are sensitive, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

configuration_settings.description: Configuration settings, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

extension_type.description: Specifies the type of extension. It must be one of the extension types registered with Microsoft.KubernetesConfiguration by the Extension publisher. For more information, please refer to [Available Extensions for Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/kubernetes/extensions-release). Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

identity.description: An `identity` block as defined below. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity. The only possible value is `SystemAssigned`

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

release_namespace.description: Namespace where the extension release must be placed for a cluster scoped extension. If this namespace does not exist, it will be created. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

release_train.description: The release train used by this extension. Possible values include but are not limited to `Stable`, `Preview`. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

target_namespace.description: Namespace where the extension will be created for a namespace scoped extension. If this namespace does not exist, it will be created. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

version.description: User-specified version that the extension should pin to. If it is not set, Azure will use the latest version and auto upgrade it. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

blob_storage.account_key.description: Specifies the account key (shared key) to access the storage account.

blob_storage.container_id.description: Specifies the Azure Blob container ID.

blob_storage.local_auth_reference.description: Specifies the name of a local secret on the Kubernetes cluster to use as the authentication secret rather than the managed or user-provided configuration secrets.

blob_storage.sas_token.description: Specifies the shared access token to access the storage container.

blob_storage.sync_interval_in_seconds.description: Specifies the interval at which to re-reconcile the cluster Azure Blob source with the remote.

blob_storage.timeout_in_seconds.description: Specifies the maximum time to attempt to reconcile the cluster Azure Blob source with the remote.

bucket.access_key.description: Specifies the plaintext access key used to securely access the S3 bucket.

bucket.bucket_name.description: Specifies the bucket name to sync from the url endpoint for the flux configuration.

bucket.local_auth_reference.description: Specifies the name of a local secret on the Kubernetes cluster to use as the authentication secret rather than the managed or user-provided configuration secrets.

bucket.secret_key_base64.description: Specifies the Base64-encoded secret key used to authenticate with the bucket source.

bucket.sync_interval_in_seconds.description: Specifies the interval at which to re-reconcile the cluster git repository source with the remote. Defaults to `600`.

bucket.timeout_in_seconds.description: Specifies the maximum time to attempt to reconcile the cluster git repository source with the remote. Defaults to `600`.

bucket.tls_enabled.description: Specify whether to communicate with a bucket using TLS is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

bucket.url.description: Specifies the URL to sync for the flux configuration S3 bucket. It must start with `http://` or `https://`.

cluster_id.description: Specifies the Cluster ID. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Cluster Extension to be created.

continuous_reconciliation_enabled.description: Whether the configuration will keep its reconciliation of its kustomizations and sources with the repository. Defaults to `true`.

git_repository.https_ca_cert_base64.description: Specifies the Base64-encoded HTTPS certificate authority contents used to access git private git repositories over HTTPS.

git_repository.https_key_base64.description: Specifies the Base64-encoded HTTPS personal access token or password that will be used to access the repository.

git_repository.https_user.description: Specifies the plaintext HTTPS username used to access private git repositories over HTTPS.

git_repository.local_auth_reference.description: Specifies the name of a local secret on the Kubernetes cluster to use as the authentication secret rather than the managed or user-provided configuration secrets. It must be between 1 and 63 characters. It can contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (-). It must start and end with a lowercase letter or number.

git_repository.reference_type.description: Specifies the source reference type for the GitRepository object. Possible values are `branch`, `commit`, `semver` and `tag`.

git_repository.reference_value.description: Specifies the source reference value for the GitRepository object.

git_repository.ssh_known_hosts_base64.description: Specifies the Base64-encoded known_hosts value containing public SSH keys required to access private git repositories over SSH.

git_repository.ssh_private_key_base64.description: Specifies the Base64-encoded SSH private key in PEM format.

git_repository.sync_interval_in_seconds.description: Specifies the interval at which to re-reconcile the cluster git repository source with the remote. Defaults to `600`.

git_repository.timeout_in_seconds.description: Specifies the maximum time to attempt to reconcile the cluster git repository source with the remote. Defaults to `600`.

git_repository.url.description: Specifies the URL to sync for the flux configuration git repository. It must start with `http://`, `https://`, `git@` or `ssh://`.

kustomizations.depends_on.description: Specifies other kustomizations that this kustomization depends on. This kustomization will not reconcile until all dependencies have completed their reconciliation.

kustomizations.garbage_collection_enable.description: Whether garbage collections of Kubernetes objects created by this kustomization is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

kustomizations.name.description: Specifies the name of the kustomization.

kustomizations.path.description: Specifies the path in the source reference to reconcile on the cluster.

kustomizations.recreating_enabled.description: Whether re-creating Kubernetes resources on the cluster is enabled when patching fails due to an immutable field change. Defaults to `false`.

kustomizations.retry_interval_in_seconds.description: The interval at which to re-reconcile the kustomization on the cluster in the event of failure on reconciliation. Defaults to `600`.

kustomizations.sync_interval_in_seconds.description: The interval at which to re-reconcile the kustomization on the cluster. Defaults to `600`.

kustomizations.timeout_in_seconds.description: The maximum time to attempt to reconcile the kustomization on the cluster. Defaults to `600`.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Arc Kubernetes Flux Configuration. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Flux Configuration to be created.

namespace.description: Specifies the namespace to which this configuration is installed to. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Flux Configuration to be created.

scope.description: Specifies the scope at which the operator will be installed. Possible values are `cluster` and `namespace`. Defaults to `namespace`. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Flux Configuration to be created.

service_principal.client_certificate_bas.description: Base64-encoded certificate used to authenticate a Service Principal .

service_principal.client_certificate_pas.description: Specifies the password for the certificate used to authenticate a Service Principal .

service_principal.client_certificate_sen.description: Specifies whether to include x5c header in client claims when acquiring a token to enable subject name / issuer based authentication for the client certificate.

service_principal.client_id.description: Specifies the client ID for authenticating a Service Principal.

service_principal.client_secret.description: Specifies the client secret for authenticating a Service Principal.

service_principal.tenant_id.description: Specifies the tenant ID for authenticating a Service Principal.

arc_agent_auto_upgrade_enabled.description: Whether the Arc agents will be upgraded automatically to the latest version. Defaults to `true`.

arc_agent_desired_version.description: The version of the Arc agents to be installed on the cluster.

azure_active_directory.admin_group_objec.description: A list of IDs of Microsoft Entra ID Groups. All members of the specified Microsoft Entra ID Groups have the cluster administrator access to the Kubernetes cluster.

azure_active_directory.azure_rbac_enable.description: Whether to enable Azure RBAC for Kubernetes authorization. Defaults to `false`.

azure_active_directory.tenant_id.description: The Tenant ID to use for authentication. If not specified, the Tenant of the Arc Kubernetes Cluster will be used.

identity.description: An `identity` block as defined below. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster to be created.

identity.type.description: The type of the Managed Identity. The only possible value is `SystemAssigned`. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster to be created.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster should exist. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster should exist. Changing this forces a new Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Arc Kubernetes Provisioned Cluster.

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity assigned to this Arc Machine. At this time the only possible value is `SystemAssigned`.

kind.description: The kind of the Arc Machine. Possible values are `AVS`, `AWS`, `EPS`, `GCP`, `HCI`, `SCVMM` and `VMware`

location.description: The Azure Region where the Arc Machine should exist

name.description: The name of the Arc machine

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Arc Machine should exist

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the Arc Machine.

arc_machine_id.description: The ARM resource ID of the Arc Machine to assign the Automanage Configuration to

configuration_id.description: The ARM resource ID of the Automanage Configuration to assign to the Virtual Machine

arc_machine_id.description: The ID of the Hybrid Compute Machine Extension. Changing this forces a new Hybrid Compute Machine Extension to be created.

automatic_upgrade_enabled.description: Indicates whether the extension should be automatically upgraded by the platform if there is a newer version available. Supported values are `true` and `false`. Defaults to `true`.

force_update_tag.description: How the extension handler should be forced to update even if the extension configuration has not changed.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Hybrid Compute Machine Extension should exist. Changing this forces a new Hybrid Compute Machine Extension to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Hybrid Compute Machine Extension. Changing this forces a new Hybrid Compute Machine Extension to be created.

protected_settings.description: Json formatted protected settings for the extension.

publisher.description: The name of the extension handler publisher, such as `Microsoft.Azure.Monitor`. Changing this forces a new Hybrid Compute Machine Extension to be created.

settings.description: Json formatted public settings for the extension.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Hybrid Compute Machine Extension.

type.description: Specifies the type of the extension. For example `CustomScriptExtension` or `AzureMonitorLinuxAgent`. Changing this forces a new Hybrid Compute Machine Extension to be created.

type_handler_version.description: Specifies the version of the script handler.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Arc Private Link Scope should exist. Changing this forces a new Azure Arc Private Link Scope to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for the Azure Arc Private Link Scope. Changing this forces a new Azure Arc Private Link Scope to be created.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Indicates whether machines associated with the private link scope can also use public Azure Arc service endpoints. Defaults to `false`. Possible values are `true` and `false`.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Azure Arc Private Link Scope should exist. Changing this forces a new Azure Arc Private Link Scope to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Azure Arc Private Link Scope.

distro.description: Specifies a supported Fabric/Infrastructure for this Arc Resource Bridge Appliance. The possible value is `AKSEdge`.

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity that should be configured on this Arc Resource Bridge Appliance. The only possible value is `SystemAssigned`

infrastructure_provider.description: The infrastructure provider about the connected Arc Resource Bridge Appliance. Possible values are `HCI`,`SCVMM` and `VMWare`

location.description: The Azure Region where the Arc Resource Bridge Appliance should exist

name.description: The Name which should be used for this Arc Resource Bridge Appliance

public_key_base64.description: The `public_key_base64` is an RSA public key in PKCS1 format encoded in base64

resource_group_name.description: Specifies the resource group where the Arc Resource Bridge Appliance exists

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Arc Resource Bridge Appliance.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Attestation Provider should exist

name.description: The name which should be used for this Attestation Provider

open_enclave_policy_base64.description: Specifies the base64 URI Encoded RFC 7519 JWT that should be used for the Attestation Policy.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the attestation provider should exist

sev_snp_policy_base64.description: Specifies the base64 URI Encoded RFC 7519 JWT that should be used for the Attestation Policy.

sgx_enclave_policy_base64.description: Specifies the base64 URI Encoded RFC 7519 JWT that should be used for the Attestation Policy.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Attestation Provider.

tpm_policy_base64.description: Specifies the base64 URI Encoded RFC 7519 JWT that should be used for the Attestation Policy.

antimalware.real_time_protection_enabled.description: Whether the real time protection is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

antimalware.scheduled_scan_day.description: The day of the scheduled scan. Possible values are `0` to `8` where `0` is daily, `1` to `7` are the days of the week and `8` is Disabled. Defaults to `8`.

antimalware.scheduled_scan_enabled.description: Whether the scheduled scan is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

antimalware.scheduled_scan_time_in_minut.description: The time of the scheduled scan in minutes. Possible values are `0` to `1439` where `0` is 12:00 AM and `1439` is 11:59 PM.

antimalware.scheduled_scan_type.description: The type of the scheduled scan. Possible values are `Quick` and `Full`. Defaults to `Quick`.

automation_account_enabled.description: Whether the automation account is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

azure_security_baseline.assignment_type.description: The assignment type of the azure security baseline. Possible values are `ApplyAndAutoCorrect`, `ApplyAndMonitor`, `Audit` and `DeployAndAutoCorrect`. Defaults to `ApplyAndAutoCorrect`.

backup.instant_rp_retention_range_in_day.description: The retention range in days of the backup policy. Defaults to `5`.

backup.policy_name.description: The name of the backup policy.

backup.time_zone.description: The timezone of the backup policy. Defaults to `UTC`.

boot_diagnostics_enabled.description: Whether the boot diagnostics are enabled. Defaults to `false`.

daily_schedule.retention_times.description: The retention times of the backup policy.

defender_for_cloud_enabled.description: Whether the defender for cloud is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

exclusions.extensions.description: The extensions to exclude from the antimalware scan, separated by `;`. For example `.ext1;.ext2`.

exclusions.paths.description: The paths to exclude from the antimalware scan, separated by `;`. For example `C:\\Windows\\Temp;D:\\Temp`.

exclusions.processes.description: The processes to exclude from the antimalware scan, separated by `;`. For example `svchost.exe;notepad.exe`.

guest_configuration_enabled.description: Whether the guest configuration is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Automanage Configuration should exist. Changing this forces a new Automanage Configuration to be created.

log_analytics_enabled.description: Whether log analytics are enabled. Defaults to `false`.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Automanage Configuration. Changing this forces a new Automanage Configuration to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Automanage Configuration should exist. Changing this forces a new Automanage Configuration to be created.

retention_duration.count.description: The count of the retention duration of the backup policy. Valid value inside `daily_schedule` is `7` to `9999` and inside `weekly_schedule` is `1` to `5163`.

retention_duration.duration_type.description: The duration type of the retention duration of the backup policy. Valid value inside `daily_schedule` is `Days` and inside `weekly_schedule` is `Weeks`. Defaults to `Days`.

retention_policy.retention_policy_type.description: The retention policy type of the backup policy. Possible value is `LongTermRetentionPolicy`. Defaults to `LongTermRetentionPolicy`.

schedule_policy.schedule_policy_type.description: The schedule policy type of the backup policy. Possible value is `SimpleSchedulePolicy`. Defaults to `SimpleSchedulePolicy`.

schedule_policy.schedule_run_days.description: The schedule run days of the backup policy. Possible values are `Sunday`, `Monday`, `Tuesday`, `Wednesday`, `Thursday`, `Friday` and `Saturday`.

schedule_policy.schedule_run_frequency.description: The schedule run frequency of the backup policy. Possible values are `Daily` and `Weekly`. Defaults to `Daily`.

schedule_policy.schedule_run_times.description: The schedule run times of the backup policy.

status_change_alert_enabled.description: Whether the status change alert is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

weekly_schedule.retention_times.description: The retention times of the backup policy.

encryption.key_vault_key_id.description: The ID of the Key Vault Key which should be used to Encrypt the data in this Automation Account.

encryption.user_assigned_identity_id.description: The User Assigned Managed Identity ID to be used for accessing the Customer Managed Key for encryption.

identity.identity_ids.description: The ID of the User Assigned Identity which should be assigned to this Automation Account.

identity.type.description: The type of identity used for this Automation Account. Possible values are `SystemAssigned`, `UserAssigned` and `SystemAssigned, UserAssigned`.

local_authentication_enabled.description: Whether requests using non-AAD authentication are blocked. Defaults to `true`.

location.description: Specifies the supported Azure location where the resource exists

name.description: Specifies the name of the Automation Account

public_network_access_enabled.description: Whether public network access is allowed for the automation account. Defaults to `true`.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Automation Account is created

sku_name.description: The SKU of the account. Possible values are `Basic` and `Free`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

base64.description: Base64 encoded value of the certificate

description.description: The description of this Automation Certificate.

exportable.description: The is exportable flag of the certificate.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Certificate

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Certificate is created

name.description: Specifies the name of the Connection

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Connection is created

type.description: The type of the Connection - can be either builtin type such as `Azure`, `AzureClassicCertificate`, and `AzureServicePrincipal`, or a user defined types

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Connection is created

automation_certificate_name.description: The name of the automation certificate.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Connection is created

subscription_id.description: The id of subscription where the automation certificate exists.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Connection is created

certificate_asset_name.description: The name of the certificate asset.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Connection is created

subscription_id.description: The id of subscription.

application_id.description: The (Client) ID of the Service Principal.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Connection is created

certificate_thumbprint.description: The thumbprint of the Service Principal Certificate.

description.description: A description for this Connection.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Connection

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Connection is created

subscription_id.description: The subscription GUID.

tenant_id.description: The ID of the Tenant the Service Principal is assigned in.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Connection is created

field.description: One or more `field` blocks as defined below. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

field.is_encrypted.description: Whether to set the isEncrypted flag of the connection field definition.

field.is_optional.description: Whether to set the isOptional flag of the connection field definition.

field.name.description: The name which should be used for this connection field definition.

field.type.description: The type of the connection field definition.

is_global.description: Whether the connection type is global. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Automation Connection Type. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Automation should exist. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Credential is created

description.description: The description associated with this Automation Credential.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Credential

password.description: The password associated with this Automation Credential.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Credential is created

username.description: The username associated with this Automation Credential.

name.description: Specifies the name of the DSC Configuration

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Automation should exist. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

vm_resource_id.description: The ID of the virtual machine used for this HybridWorker. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

worker_group_name.description: The name of the HybridWorker Group. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

worker_id.description: Specify the ID of this HybridWorker in UUID notation. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

credential_name.description: The name of resource type `azurerm_automation_credential` to use for hybrid worker.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Automation should exist. Changing this forces a new Automation to be created.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the Automation Account in which the Job Schedule is created

parameters.description: A map of key/value pairs corresponding to the arguments that can be passed to the Runbook

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Job Schedule is created

run_on.description: Name of a Hybrid Worker Group the Runbook will be executed on

runbook_name.description: The name of a Runbook to link to a Schedule. It needs to be in the same Automation Account as the Schedule and Job Schedule

hash.algorithm.description: Specifies the algorithm used for the hash content.

hash.value.description: The hash value of the content.

module_link.uri.description: The URI of the module content (zip or nupkg).

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Module is created

automation_account_id.description: The ID of Automation Account to manage this Watcher. Changing this forces a new Watcher to be created.

hash.algorithm.description: Specifies the algorithm used for the hash content.

hash.value.description: The hash value of the content.

module_link.uri.description: The URI of the module content (zip or nupkg).

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Python3 Package is created

content_uri.description: The URL of the python package. Changing this forces a new Automation Python3 Package to be created.

content_version.description: Specify the version of the python3 package. The value should meet the system.version class format like `1.1.1`. Changing this forces a new Automation Python3 Package to be created.

hash_algorithm.description: Specify the hash algorithm used to hash the content of the python3 package. Changing this forces a new Automation Python3 Package to be created.

hash_value.description: Specity the hash value of the content. Changing this forces a new Automation Python3 Package to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Automation Python3 Package. Changing this forces a new Automation Python3 Package to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Python3 Package is created

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Automation Python3 Package.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Runbook is created

content.description: The desired content of the runbook.

description.description: A description for the runbook.

draft.edit_mode_enabled.description: Whether the draft in edit mode.

draft.output_types.description: Specifies the output types of the runbook.

draft.parameters.description: A list of `parameters` block as defined below.

hash.algorithm.description: Specifies the hash algorithm used to hash the content.

hash.value.description: Specifies the expected hash value of the content.

job_schedule.description: One or more `job_schedule` block as defined below.

job_schedule.parameters.description: A map of key/value pairs corresponding to the arguments that can be passed to the Runbook.

job_schedule.run_on.description: Name of a Hybrid Worker Group the Runbook will be executed on.

location.description: Specifies the supported Azure location where the resource exists

log_activity_trace_level.description: Specifies the activity-level tracing options of the runbook, available only for Graphical runbooks. Possible values are `0` for None, `9` for Basic, and `15` for Detailed. Must turn on Verbose logging in order to see the tracing.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Runbook

parameters.default_value.description: Specifies the default value of the parameter.

parameters.position.description: Specifies the position of the parameter.

parameters.type.description: Specifies the type of this parameter.

publish_content_link.uri.description: The URI of the runbook content.

publish_content_link.version.description: Specifies the version of the content

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which the Runbook is created

runbook_type.description: The type of the runbook - can be either `Graph`, `GraphPowerShell`, `GraphPowerShellWorkflow`, `PowerShellWorkflow`, `PowerShell`, `PowerShell72`, `Python`, `Python3`, `Python2` or `Script`

runtime_environment_name.description: The runtime environment name for the runbook.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

automation_account_id.description: The ID of the automation account in which the Automation Runtime Environment is created

description.description: A description of the Automation Runtime Environment.

location.description: The location where the Automation Runtime Environment is created

name.description: The name for the Automation Runtime Environment. Changing this forces a new Automation Runtime Environment to be created.

runtime_default_packages.description: A mapping of default packages to be installed in the Automation Runtime Environment. The default packages can only be used with PowerShell runtime environments. Removing packages will force a new Automation Runtime Environment, adding new packages will update the existing Automation Runtime Environment.

runtime_language.description: The programming language used by the Automation Runtime Environment. Possible values are `Python` and `PowerShell`. Changing this forces a new Automation Runtime Environment to be created.

runtime_version.description: The version of the runtime environment. Changing this forces a new Automation Runtime Environment to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Automation Runtime Environment.

automation_account_name.description: The name of the automation account in which the Schedule is created

description.description: A description for this Schedule.

expiry_time.description: The end time of the schedule.

frequency.description: The frequency of the schedule. - can be either `OneTime`, `Day`, `Hour`, `Week`, or `Month`.

interval.description: The number of `frequency`s between runs. Only valid when frequency is `Day`, `Hour`, `Week`, or `Month` and defaults to `1`.

month_days.description: List of days of the month that the job should execute on. Must be between `1` and `31`. `-1` for last day of the month. Only valid when frequency is `Month`.

monthly_occurrence.description: One `monthly_occurrence` blocks as defined below to specifies occurrences of days within a month. Only valid when frequency is `Month`. The `monthly_occurrence` block supports fields documented below.

monthly_occurrence.day.description: Day of the occurrence. Must be one of `Monday`, `Tuesday`, `Wednesday`, `Thursday`, `Friday`, `Saturday`, `Sunday`.

monthly_occurrence.occurrence.description: Occurrence of the week within the month. Must be between `1` and `5`. `-1` for last week within the month.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Schedule

backup.description: Configures the Policy backup frequency and times as documented in the `backup` block below.

backup.frequency.description: Sets the backup frequency. Possible values are `Daily` and `Hourly`.

hourly.interval.description: Specifies the interval at which backup needs to be triggered. Possible values are `4`, `6`, `8` and `12`.

hourly.start_time.description: Specifies the start time of the hourly backup. The time format should be in 24-hour format. Times must be either on the hour or half hour (e.g. 12:00, 12:30, 13:00, etc.).

hourly.window_duration.description: Species the duration of the backup window in hours. Details could be found [here](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/backup/backup-azure-files-faq#what-does-the-duration-attribute-in-azure-files-backup-policy-signify-).
