dns_servers.description: A list of IPv4 addresses of DNS servers available to VMs deployed in the Network Interface

ip_configuration.private_ip_address.description: The IPv4 address of the IP configuration

ip_configuration.subnet_id.description: The resource ID of the Stack HCI Logical Network bound to the IP configuration

location.description: The Azure Region where the Azure Stack HCI Network Interface should exist

mac_address.description: The MAC address of the Network Interface

name.description: The name which should be used for this Azure Stack HCI Network Interface

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Azure Stack HCI Network Interface should exist

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Azure Stack HCI Network Interface.

custom_location_id.description: The ID of Custom Location where the Azure Stack HCI Storage Path should exist

location.description: The Azure Region where the Azure Stack HCI Storage Path should exist

name.description: The name which should be used for this Azure Stack HCI Storage Path

path.description: The file path on the disk to create the Storage Path

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Azure Stack HCI Storage Path should exist

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Azure Stack HCI Storage Path.

block_size_in_bytes.description: The block size of the disk in bytes. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

custom_location_id.description: The ID of the Custom Location where the Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk should exist. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

disk_file_format.description: The format of the disk file. Possible values are `vhdx` and `vhd`. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

disk_size_in_gb.description: The size of the disk in GB. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

dynamic_enabled.description: Whether to enable dynamic sizing for the Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk. Defaults to `false`. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

hyperv_generation.description: The hypervisor generation of the Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk. Possible values are `V1` and `V2`. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk should exist. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

logical_sector_in_bytes.description: The logical sector size of the disk in bytes. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

physical_sector_in_bytes.description: The physical sector size of the disk in bytes. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk should exist. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

storage_path_id.description: The ID of the Azure Stack HCI Storage Path used for this Virtual Hard Disk. Changing this forces a new Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Azure Stack HCI Virtual Hard Disk.

app_settings.description: A key-value pair of App Settings.

identity.identity_ids.description: A list of Managed Identity IDs which should be assigned to this Static Site resource.

identity.type.description: The Type of Managed Identity assigned to this Static Site resource. Possible values are `SystemAssigned`, `UserAssigned` and `SystemAssigned, UserAssigned`.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Static Web App should exist. Changing this forces a new Static Web App to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Static Web App. Changing this forces a new Static Web App to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Static Web App should exist. Changing this forces a new Static Web App to be created.

sku_size.description: Specifies the SKU size of the Static Web App. Possible values are `Free` or `Standard`. Defaults to `Free`.

sku_tier.description: Specifies the SKU tier of the Static Web App. Possible values are `Free` or `Standard`. Defaults to `Free`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

domain_name.description: The Domain Name which should be associated with this Static Site. Changing this forces a new Static Site Custom Domain to be created.

static_site_id.description: The ID of the Static Site. Changing this forces a new Static Site Custom Domain to be created.

validation_type.description: One of `cname-delegation` or `dns-txt-token`. Changing this forces a new Static Site Custom Domain to be created.

app_settings.description: A key-value pair of App Settings.

basic_auth.environments.description: The Environment types to use the Basic Auth for access. Possible values include `AllEnvironments` and `StagingEnvironments`.

basic_auth.password.description: The password for the basic authentication access.

configuration_file_changes_enabled.description: Should changes to the configuration file be permitted. Defaults to `true`.

identity.identity_ids.description: A list of Managed Identity IDs which should be assigned to this Static Web App resource.

identity.type.description: The Type of Managed Identity assigned to this Static Web App resource. Possible values are `SystemAssigned`, `UserAssigned` and `SystemAssigned, UserAssigned`.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Static Web App should exist. Changing this forces a new Static Web App to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Static Web App. Changing this forces a new Static Web App to be created.

preview_environments_enabled.description: Are Preview (Staging) environments enabled. Defaults to `true`.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Should public network access be enabled for the Static Web App. Defaults to `true`.

repository_branch.description: Repository branch to use for the Static Web App. `repository_url` and `repository_token` must also be set.

repository_token.description: Repository Token with `admin` privileges to use for the Static Web App. `repository_branch` and `repository_url` must also be set.

repository_url.description: Repository URL to use for the Static Web App. `repository_branch` and `repository_token` must also be set.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Static Web App should exist. Changing this forces a new Static Web App to be created.

sku_size.description: Specifies the SKU size of the Static Web App. Possible values are `Free` or `Standard`. Defaults to `Free`.

sku_tier.description: Specifies the SKU tier of the Static Web App. Possible values are `Free` or `Standard`. Defaults to `Free`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

domain_name.description: The Domain Name which should be associated with this Static Site. Changing this forces a new Static Site Custom Domain to be created.

static_web_app_id.description: The ID of the Static Site. Changing this forces a new Static Site Custom Domain to be created.

validation_type.description: One of `cname-delegation` or `dns-txt-token`. Changing this forces a new Static Site Custom Domain to be created.

function_app_id.description: - The ID of a Linux or Windows Function App to connect to the Static Web App as a Backend

static_web_app_id.description: - The ID of the Static Web App to register the Function App to as a backend

access_tier.description: Defines the access tier for `BlobStorage`, `FileStorage` and `StorageV2` accounts. Valid options are `Hot`, `Cool`, `Cold` and `Premium`. Defaults to `Hot`.

account_kind.description: Defines the Kind of account. Valid options are `BlobStorage`, `BlockBlobStorage`, `FileStorage`, `Storage` and `StorageV2`. Defaults to `StorageV2`.

account_replication_type.description: Defines the type of replication to use for this storage account. Valid options are `LRS`, `GRS`, `RAGRS`, `ZRS`, `GZRS` and `RAGZRS`

account_tier.description: Defines the Tier to use for this storage account. Valid options are `Standard` and `Premium`. For `BlockBlobStorage` and `FileStorage` accounts only `Premium` is valid

active_directory.domain_name.description: Specifies the primary domain that the AD DNS server is authoritative for.

active_directory.domain_sid.description: Specifies the security identifier (SID). This is required when `directory_type` is set to `AD`.

active_directory.forest_name.description: Specifies the Active Directory forest. This is required when `directory_type` is set to `AD`.

active_directory.netbios_domain_name.description: Specifies the NetBIOS domain name. This is required when `directory_type` is set to `AD`.

active_directory.storage_sid.description: Specifies the security identifier (SID) for Azure Storage. This is required when `directory_type` is set to `AD`.

allow_nested_items_to_be_public.description: Allow or disallow nested items within this Account to opt into being public. Defaults to `true`.

allowed_copy_scope.description: Restrict copy to and from Storage Accounts within an AAD tenant or with Private Links to the same VNet. Possible values are `AAD` and `PrivateLink`.

azure_files_authentication.active_direct.description: A `active_directory` block as defined below. Required when `directory_type` is `AD`.

azure_files_authentication.default_share.description: Specifies the default share level permissions applied to all users. Possible values are `StorageFileDataSmbShareReader`, `StorageFileDataSmbShareContributor`, `StorageFileDataSmbShareElevatedContributor`, or `None`. Defaults to `None`.

azure_files_authentication.directory_typ.description: Specifies the directory service used. Possible values are `AADDS`, `AD` and `AADKERB`.

blob_properties.change_feed_enabled.description: Is the blob service properties for change feed events enabled? Default to `false`.

blob_properties.change_feed_retention_in.description: The duration of change feed events retention in days. The possible values are between 1 and 146000 days (400 years). Setting this to null (or omit this in the configuration file) indicates an infinite retention of the change feed.

blob_properties.default_service_version.description: The API Version which should be used by default for requests to the Data Plane API if an incoming request doesn't specify an API Version.

blob_properties.last_access_time_enabled.description: Is the last access time based tracking enabled? Default to `false`.

blob_properties.restore_policy.description: A `restore_policy` block as defined below. This must be used together with `delete_retention_policy` set, `versioning_enabled` and `change_feed_enabled` set to `true`.

container_delete_retention_policy.days.description: Specifies the number of days that the container should be retained, between `1` and `365` days. Defaults to `7`.

cors_rule.allowed_headers.description: A list of headers that are allowed to be a part of the cross-origin request.

cors_rule.allowed_methods.description: A list of HTTP methods that are allowed to be executed by the origin. Valid options are

cors_rule.allowed_origins.description: A list of origin domains that will be allowed by CORS.

cors_rule.exposed_headers.description: A list of response headers that are exposed to CORS clients.

cors_rule.max_age_in_seconds.description: The number of seconds the client should cache a preflight response.

cross_tenant_replication_enabled.description: Should cross Tenant replication be enabled? Defaults to `false`.

custom_domain.name.description: The Custom Domain Name to use for the Storage Account, which will be validated by Azure.

custom_domain.use_subdomain.description: Should the Custom Domain Name be validated by using indirect CNAME validation?

customer_managed_key.key_vault_key_id.description: The ID of the Key Vault Key, supplying a version-less key ID will enable auto-rotation of this key.

customer_managed_key.user_assigned_ident.description: The ID of a user assigned identity.

default_to_oauth_authentication.description: Default to Azure Active Directory authorization in the Azure portal when accessing the Storage Account. The default value is `false`

delete_retention_policy.days.description: Specifies the number of days that the blob should be retained, between `1` and `365` days. Defaults to `7`.

delete_retention_policy.permanent_delete.description: Indicates whether permanent deletion of the soft deleted blob versions and snapshots is allowed. Defaults to `false`.

dns_endpoint_type.description: Specifies which DNS endpoint type to use. Possible values are `Standard` and `AzureDnsZone`. Defaults to `Standard`

edge_zone.description: Specifies the Edge Zone within the Azure Region where this Storage Account should exist. Changing this forces a new Storage Account to be created.

hour_metrics.enabled.description: Indicates whether hour metrics are enabled for the Queue service.

hour_metrics.include_apis.description: Indicates whether metrics should generate summary statistics for called API operations.

hour_metrics.retention_policy_days.description: Specifies the number of days that logs will be retained.

hour_metrics.version.description: The version of storage analytics to configure.

https_traffic_only_enabled.description: Boolean flag which forces HTTPS if enabled, see [here](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/storage/storage-require-secure-transfer/) for more information. Defaults to `true`.

identity.identity_ids.description: Specifies a list of User Assigned Managed Identity IDs to be assigned to this Storage Account.

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity that should be configured on this Storage Account. Possible values are `SystemAssigned`, `UserAssigned`, `SystemAssigned, UserAssigned` (to enable both).

immutability_policy.allow_protected_appe.description: When enabled, new blocks can be written to an append blob while maintaining immutability protection and compliance. Only new blocks can be added and any existing blocks cannot be modified or deleted.

immutability_policy.period_since_creatio.description: The immutability period for the blobs in the container since the policy creation, in days.

immutability_policy.state.description: Defines the mode of the policy. `Disabled` state disables the policy, `Unlocked` state allows increase and decrease of immutability retention time and also allows toggling allowProtectedAppendWrites property, `Locked` state only allows the increase of the immutability retention time. A policy can only be created in a Disabled or Unlocked state and can be toggled between the two states. Only a policy in an Unlocked state can transition to a Locked state which cannot be reverted.

is_hns_enabled.description: Is Hierarchical Namespace enabled? This can be used with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen 2 ([see here for more information](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/storage/blobs/data-lake-storage-quickstart-create-account/))

large_file_share_enabled.description: Are Large File Shares Enabled? Defaults to `false`.

local_user_enabled.description: Is Local User Enabled? Defaults to `true`.

location.description: Specifies the supported Azure location where the resource exists

logging.delete.description: Indicates whether all delete requests should be logged.

logging.read.description: Indicates whether all read requests should be logged.

logging.retention_policy_days.description: Specifies the number of days that logs will be retained.

logging.version.description: The version of storage analytics to configure.

logging.write.description: Indicates whether all write requests should be logged.

min_tls_version.description: The minimum supported TLS version for the storage account. Possible values are `TLS1_0`, `TLS1_1`, `TLS1_2` and `TLS1_3`. Defaults to `TLS1_2` for new storage accounts.

minute_metrics.enabled.description: Indicates whether minute metrics are enabled for the Queue service.

minute_metrics.include_apis.description: Indicates whether metrics should generate summary statistics for called API operations.

minute_metrics.retention_policy_days.description: Specifies the number of days that logs will be retained.

minute_metrics.version.description: The version of storage analytics to configure.

name.description: Specifies the name of the storage account. Only lowercase Alphanumeric characters allowed

network_rules.bypass.description: Specifies whether traffic is bypassed for Logging/Metrics/AzureServices. Valid options are any combination of `Logging`, `Metrics`, `AzureServices`, or `None`.

network_rules.default_action.description: Specifies the default action of allow or deny when no other rules match. Valid options are `Deny` or `Allow`.

network_rules.ip_rules.description: List of public IP or IP ranges in CIDR Format. Only IPv4 addresses are allowed. /31 CIDRs, /32 CIDRs, and Private IP address ranges (as defined in [RFC 1918](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc1918#section-3)), are not allowed.

network_rules.private_link_access.description: One or more `private_link_access` block as defined below.

network_rules.virtual_network_subnet_ids.description: A list of resource ids for subnets.

private_link_access.endpoint_resource_id.description: The ID of the Azure resource that should be allowed access to the target storage account.

private_link_access.endpoint_tenant_id.description: The tenant id of the resource of the resource access rule to be granted access. Defaults to the current tenant id.

provisioned_billing_model_version.description: Specifies the version of the **provisioned** billing model (e.g. when `account_kind = "FileStorage"` for Storage File). Possible value is `V2`

public_network_access_enabled.description: Whether the public network access is enabled? Defaults to `true`.

queue_encryption_key_type.description: The encryption type of the queue service. Possible values are `Service` and `Account`

resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group in which to create the storage account

restore_policy.days.description: Specifies the number of days that the blob can be restored, between `1` and `365` days. This must be less than the `days` specified for `delete_retention_policy`.

retention_policy.days.description: Specifies the number of days that the `azurerm_storage_share` should be retained, between `1` and `365` days. Defaults to `7`.

routing.choice.description: Specifies the kind of network routing opted by the user. Possible values are `InternetRouting` and `MicrosoftRouting`. Defaults to `MicrosoftRouting`.

routing.publish_internet_endpoints.description: Should internet routing storage endpoints be published? Defaults to `false`.

routing.publish_microsoft_endpoints.description: Should Microsoft routing storage endpoints be published? Defaults to `false`.

sas_policy.expiration_action.description: The SAS expiration action. Possible values are `Log` and `Block`. Defaults to `Log`.

sas_policy.expiration_period.description: The SAS expiration period in format of `DD.HH:MM:SS`.

sftp_enabled.description: Boolean, enable SFTP for the storage account

shared_access_key_enabled.description: Indicates whether the storage account permits requests to be authorized with the account access key via Shared Key. If false, then all requests, including shared access signatures, must be authorized with Azure Active Directory (Azure AD). Defaults to `true`.

smb.authentication_types.description: A set of SMB authentication methods. Possible values are `NTLMv2`, and `Kerberos`.

smb.channel_encryption_type.description: A set of SMB channel encryption. Possible values are `AES-128-CCM`, `AES-128-GCM`, and `AES-256-GCM`.

smb.kerberos_ticket_encryption_type.description: A set of Kerberos ticket encryption. Possible values are `RC4-HMAC`, and `AES-256`.

smb.multichannel_enabled.description: Indicates whether multichannel is enabled. Defaults to `false`. This is only supported on Premium storage accounts.

smb.versions.description: A set of SMB protocol versions. Possible values are `SMB2.1`, `SMB3.0`, and `SMB3.1.1`.

static_website.error_404_document.description: The absolute path to a custom webpage that should be used when a request is made which does not correspond to an existing file.

static_website.index_document.description: The webpage that Azure Storage serves for requests to the root of a website or any subfolder. For example, index.html. The value is case-sensitive.

table_encryption_key_type.description: The encryption type of the table service. Possible values are `Service` and `Account`

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

federated_identity_client_id.description: The Client ID of the multi-tenant application to be used in conjunction with the user-assigned identity for cross-tenant customer-managed-keys server-side encryption on the storage account.

key_vault_key_id.description: The ID of the Key Vault Key.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Storage Account

user_assigned_identity_id.description: The ID of a user assigned identity.

home_directory.description: The home directory of the Storage Account Local User.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Storage Account Local User. Changing this forces a new Storage Account Local User to be created.

permission_scope.description: One or more `permission_scope` blocks as defined below.

permission_scope.resource_name.description: The container name (when `service` is set to `blob`) or the file share name (when `service` is set to `file`), used by the Storage Account Local User.

permission_scope.service.description: The storage service used by this Storage Account Local User. Possible values are `blob` and `file`.

permissions.create.description: Specifies if the Local User has the create permission for this scope. Defaults to `false`.

permissions.delete.description: Specifies if the Local User has the delete permission for this scope. Defaults to `false`.

permissions.list.description: Specifies if the Local User has the list permission for this scope. Defaults to `false`.

permissions.read.description: Specifies if the Local User has the read permission for this scope. Defaults to `false`.

permissions.write.description: Specifies if the Local User has the write permission for this scope. Defaults to `false`.

ssh_authorized_key.description: One or more `ssh_authorized_key` blocks as defined below.

ssh_authorized_key.description.description: The description of this SSH authorized key.

ssh_authorized_key.key.description: The public key value of this SSH authorized key.

ssh_key_enabled.description: Specifies whether SSH Key Authentication is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

ssh_password_enabled.description: Specifies whether SSH Password Authentication is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Storage Account that this Storage Account Local User resides in. Changing this forces a new Storage Account Local User to be created.

bypass.description: Specifies whether traffic is bypassed for Logging/Metrics/AzureServices. Valid options are any combination of `Logging`, `Metrics`, `AzureServices`, or `None`. Defaults to `["AzureServices"]`.

default_action.description: Specifies the default action of allow or deny when no other rules match. Valid options are `Deny` or `Allow`.

ip_rules.description: List of public IP or IP ranges in CIDR Format. Only IPv4 addresses are allowed. Private IP address ranges (as defined in [RFC 1918](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc1918#section-3)) are not allowed.

private_link_access.description: One or more `private_link_access` block as defined below.

private_link_access.endpoint_resource_id.description: The resource id of the resource access rule to be granted access.

private_link_access.endpoint_tenant_id.description: The tenant id of the resource of the resource access rule to be granted access. Defaults to the current tenant id.

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the ID of the storage account

virtual_network_subnet_ids.description: A list of virtual network subnet ids to secure the storage account.

cors_rule.allowed_headers.description: A list of headers that are allowed to be a part of the cross-origin request.

cors_rule.allowed_methods.description: A list of HTTP methods that are allowed to be executed by the origin. Valid options are `DELETE`, `GET`, `HEAD`, `MERGE`, `POST`, `OPTIONS`, `PUT` or `PATCH`.

cors_rule.allowed_origins.description: A list of origin domains that will be allowed by CORS.

cors_rule.exposed_headers.description: A list of response headers that are exposed to CORS clients.

cors_rule.max_age_in_seconds.description: The number of seconds the client should cache a preflight response.

hour_metrics.include_apis.description: Indicates whether metrics should generate summary statistics for called API operations.

hour_metrics.retention_policy_days.description: Specifies the number of days that logs will be retained.

hour_metrics.version.description: The version of storage analytics to configure.

logging.delete.description: Indicates whether all delete requests should be logged.

logging.read.description: Indicates whether all read requests should be logged.

logging.retention_policy_days.description: Specifies the number of days that logs will be retained.

logging.version.description: The version of storage analytics to configure.

logging.write.description: Indicates whether all write requests should be logged.

minute_metrics.include_apis.description: Indicates whether metrics should generate summary statistics for called API operations.

minute_metrics.retention_policy_days.description: Specifies the number of days that logs will be retained.

minute_metrics.version.description: The version of storage analytics to configure.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Storage Account to set Queue Properties on

error_404_document.description: The absolute path to a custom webpage that should be used when a request is made which does not correspond to an existing file.

index_document.description: The webpage that Azure Storage serves for requests to the root of a website or any subfolder. For example, index.html.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Storage Account to set Static Website on

access_tier.description: The access tier of the storage blob. Possible values are `Archive`, `Cool` and `Hot`.

cache_control.description: Controls the [cache control header](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Cache-Control) content of the response when blob is requested .

content_md5.description: The MD5 sum of the blob contents. Cannot be defined if `source_uri` is defined, or if blob type is Append or Page

content_type.description: The content type of the storage blob. Cannot be defined if `source_uri` is defined. Defaults to `application/octet-stream`.

encryption_scope.description: The encryption scope to use for this blob

metadata.description: A map of custom blob metadata.

name.description: The name of the storage blob. Must be unique within the storage container the blob is located

parallelism.description: The number of workers per CPU core to run for concurrent uploads. Defaults to `8`

size.description: Used only for `page` blobs to specify the size in bytes of the blob to be created. Must be a multiple of 512. Defaults to `0`

source.description: An absolute path to a file on the local system. This field cannot be specified for Append blobs and cannot be specified if `source_content` or `source_uri` is specified

source_content.description: The content for this blob which should be defined inline. This field can only be specified for Block blobs and cannot be specified if `source` or `source_uri` is specified

source_uri.description: The URI of an existing blob, or a file in the Azure File service, to use as the source contents for the blob to be created

storage_account_name.description: Specifies the storage account in which to create the storage container

storage_container_name.description: The name of the storage container in which this blob should be created

type.description: The type of the storage blob to be created. Possible values are `Append`, `Block` or `Page`

filter.blob_types.description: A set of blob types. Possible values are `blockBlob`, `appendBlob`, and `pageBlob`. The storage account with `is_hns_enabled` is `true` doesn't support `pageBlob`.

filter.exclude_prefixes.description: A set of strings for blob prefixes to be excluded. Maximum of 10 blob prefixes.

filter.include_blob_versions.description: Includes blob versions in blob inventory or not? Defaults to `false`.

filter.include_deleted.description: Includes deleted blobs in blob inventory or not? Defaults to `false`.

filter.include_snapshots.description: Includes blob snapshots in blob inventory or not? Defaults to `false`.

filter.prefix_match.description: A set of strings for blob prefixes to be matched. Maximum of 10 blob prefixes.

rules.description: One or more `rules` blocks as defined below.

rules.format.description: The format of the inventory files. Possible values are `Csv` and `Parquet`.

rules.name.description: The name which should be used for this Blob Inventory Policy Rule.

rules.schedule.description: The inventory schedule applied by this rule. Possible values are `Daily` and `Weekly`.

rules.schema_fields.description: A list of fields to be included in the inventory. See the [Azure API reference](https://docs.microsoft.com/rest/api/storagerp/blob-inventory-policies/create-or-update#blobinventorypolicydefinition) for all the supported fields.

rules.scope.description: The scope of the inventory for this rule. Possible values are `Blob` and `Container`.

rules.storage_container_name.description: The storage container name to store the blob inventory files for this rule.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the storage account to apply this Blob Inventory Policy to. Changing this forces a new Storage Blob Inventory Policy to be created.

container_access_type.description: The Access Level configured for this Container. Possible values are `blob`, `container` or `private`. Defaults to `private`.

default_encryption_scope.description: The default encryption scope to use for blobs uploaded to this container

encryption_scope_override_enabled.description: Whether to allow blobs to override the default encryption scope for this container. Can only be set when specifying `default_encryption_scope`. Defaults to `true`

metadata.description: A mapping of MetaData for this Container. All metadata keys should be lowercase.

name.description: The name of the Container which should be created within the Storage Account

storage_account_id.description: The name of the Storage Account where the Container should be created.

storage_account_name.description: The name of the Storage Account where the Container should be created. This property is deprecated in favour of `storage_account_id`.

immutability_period_in_days.description: The time interval in days that the data needs to be kept in a non-erasable and non-modifiable state.

locked.description: Whether to lock this immutability policy. Cannot be set to `false` once the policy has been locked.

protected_append_writes_all_enabled.description: Whether to allow protected append writes to block and append blobs to the container. Defaults to `false`. Cannot be set with `protected_append_writes_enabled`.

protected_append_writes_enabled.description: Whether to allow protected append writes to append blobs to the container. Defaults to `false`. Cannot be set with `protected_append_writes_all_enabled`.

storage_container_resource_manager_id.description: The Resource Manager ID of the Storage Container where this Immutability Policy should be applied

ace.description: One or more `ace` blocks as defined below to specify the entries for the ACL for the path.

ace.id.description: Specifies the Object ID of the Azure Active Directory User or Group that the entry relates to. Only valid for `user` or `group` entries.

ace.permissions.description: Specifies the permissions for the entry in `rwx` form. For example, `rwx` gives full permissions but `r--` only gives read permissions.

ace.scope.description: Specifies whether the ACE represents an `access` entry or a `default` entry. Default value is `access`.

ace.type.description: Specifies the type of entry. Can be `user`, `group`, `mask` or `other`.

default_encryption_scope.description: The default encryption scope to use for this filesystem

group.description: Specifies the Object ID of the Azure Active Directory Group to make the owning group of the root path (i.e. `/`). Possible values also include `$superuser`.

name.description: The name of the Data Lake Gen2 File System which should be created within the Storage Account. Must be unique within the storage account the queue is located

owner.description: Specifies the Object ID of the Azure Active Directory User to make the owning user of the root path (i.e. `/`). Possible values also include `$superuser`.

properties.description: A mapping of Key to Base64-Encoded Values which should be assigned to this Data Lake Gen2 File System.

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Storage Account in which the Data Lake Gen2 File System should exist

ace.description: One or more `ace` blocks as defined below to specify the entries for the ACL for the path.

ace.id.description: Specifies the Object ID of the Azure Active Directory User or Group that the entry relates to. Only valid for `user` or `group` entries.

ace.permissions.description: Specifies the permissions for the entry in `rwx` form. For example, `rwx` gives full permissions but `r--` only gives read permissions.

ace.scope.description: Specifies whether the ACE represents an `access` entry or a `default` entry. Default value is `access`.

ace.type.description: Specifies the type of entry. Can be `user`, `group`, `mask` or `other`.

filesystem_name.description: The name of the Data Lake Gen2 File System which should be created within the Storage Account. Must be unique within the storage account the queue is located

group.description: Specifies the Object ID of the Azure Active Directory Group to make the owning group. Possible values also include `$superuser`.

owner.description: Specifies the Object ID of the Azure Active Directory User to make the owning user. Possible values also include `$superuser`.

path.description: The path which should be created within the Data Lake Gen2 File System in the Storage Account

resource.description: Specifies the type for path to create. Currently only `directory` is supported

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Storage Account in which the Data Lake Gen2 File System should exist

infrastructure_encryption_required.description: Is a secondary layer of encryption with Platform Managed Keys for data applied?

key_vault_key_id.description: The ID of the Key Vault Key. Required when `source` is `Microsoft.KeyVault`.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Storage Encryption Scope. Changing this forces a new Storage Encryption Scope to be created.

source.description: The source of the Storage Encryption Scope. Possible values are `Microsoft.KeyVault` and `Microsoft.Storage`.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Storage Account where this Storage Encryption Scope is created. Changing this forces a new Storage Encryption Scope to be created.

base_blob.auto_tier_to_hot_from_cool_ena.description: Whether a blob should automatically be tiered from cool back to hot if it's accessed again after being tiered to cool. Defaults to `false`.

base_blob.delete_after_days_since_creati.description: The age in days after creation to delete the blob. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

base_blob.delete_after_days_since_last_a.description: The age in days after last access time to delete the blob. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

base_blob.delete_after_days_since_modifi.description: The age in days after last modification to delete the blob. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

base_blob.tier_to_archive_after_days_sin.description: The age in days after creation to archive storage. Supports blob currently at Hot or Cool tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last access time to tier blobs to archive storage. Supports blob currently at Hot or Cool tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last tier change to the blobs to skip to be archived. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last modification to tier blobs to archive storage. Supports blob currently at Hot or Cool tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

base_blob.tier_to_cold_after_days_since_.description: The age in days after creation to cold storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last access time to tier blobs to cold storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last modification to tier blobs to cold storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

base_blob.tier_to_cool_after_days_since_.description: The age in days after creation to cool storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last access time to tier blobs to cool storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.
The age in days after last modification to tier blobs to cool storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

filters.blob_types.description: An array of predefined values. Valid options are `blockBlob` and `appendBlob`.

filters.match_blob_index_tag.description: A `match_blob_index_tag` block as defined below. The block defines the blob index tag based filtering for blob objects.

filters.prefix_match.description: An array of strings for prefixes to be matched.

match_blob_index_tag.name.description: The filter tag name used for tag based filtering for blob objects.

match_blob_index_tag.operation.description: The comparison operator which is used for object comparison and filtering. Possible value is `==`. Defaults to `==`.

match_blob_index_tag.value.description: The filter tag value used for tag based filtering for blob objects.

rule.enabled.description: Boolean to specify whether the rule is enabled.

rule.name.description: The name of the rule. Rule name is case-sensitive. It must be unique within a policy.

snapshot.change_tier_to_archive_after_da.description: The age in days after creation to tier blob snapshot to archive storage. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

snapshot.change_tier_to_cool_after_days_.description: The age in days after creation to tier blob snapshot to cool storage. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

snapshot.delete_after_days_since_creatio.description: The age in days after creation to delete the blob snapshot. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

snapshot.tier_to_archive_after_days_sinc.description: The age in days after last tier change to the blobs to skip to be archived. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

snapshot.tier_to_cold_after_days_since_c.description: The age in days after creation to cold storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the id of the storage account to apply the management policy to

version.change_tier_to_archive_after_day.description: The age in days after creation to tier blob version to archive storage. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

version.change_tier_to_cool_after_days_s.description: The age in days creation create to tier blob version to cool storage. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

version.delete_after_days_since_creation.description: The age in days after creation to delete the blob version. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

version.tier_to_archive_after_days_since.description: The age in days after last tier change to the blobs to skip to be archived. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

version.tier_to_cold_after_days_since_cr.description: The age in days after creation to cold storage. Supports blob currently at Hot tier. Must be between `0` and `99999`. Defaults to `-1`.

description.description: A description for the Storage Mover.

location.description: Specifies the Azure Region where the Storage Mover should exist. Changing this forces a new Storage Mover to be created.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Storage Mover. Changing this forces a new Storage Mover to be created.

resource_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the Resource Group where the Storage Mover should exist. Changing this forces a new Storage Mover to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Storage Mover.

arc_virtual_machine_id.description: Specifies the fully qualified ID of the Hybrid Compute resource for the Storage Mover Agent

arc_virtual_machine_uuid.description: Specifies the Hybrid Compute resource's unique SMBIOS ID

description.description: Specifies a description for this Storage Mover Agent.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Storage Mover Agent

storage_mover_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Storage Mover that this Agent should be connected to

agent_name.description: Specifies the name of the Storage Mover Agent to assign for new Job Runs of this Storage Mover Job Definition.

copy_mode.description: Specifies the strategy to use for copy. Possible values are `Additive` and `Mirror`.

description.description: Specifies a description for this Storage Mover Job Definition.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Storage Mover Job Definition

source_name.description: Specifies the name of the Storage Mover Source Endpoint

source_sub_path.description: Specifies the sub path to use when reading from the Storage Mover Source Endpoint

storage_mover_project_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Storage Mover Project

target_name.description: Specifies the name of the Storage Mover target Endpoint

target_sub_path.description: Specifies the sub path to use when writing to the Storage Mover Target Endpoint

description.description: Specifies a description for this Storage Mover Project.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Storage Mover Project

storage_mover_id.description: Specifies the ID of the storage mover for this Storage Mover Project

description.description: Specifies a description for the Storage Mover Source Endpoint.

export.description: Specifies the directory being exported from the server

host.description: Specifies the host name or IP address of the server exporting the file system

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Storage Mover Source Endpoint

nfs_version.description: Specifies the NFS protocol version. Possible values are `NFSauto`, `NFSv3` and `NFSv4`. Defaults to `NFSauto`

storage_mover_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Storage Mover for this Storage Mover Source Endpoint

description.description: Specifies a description for the Storage Mover Target Endpoint.

name.description: Specifies the name which should be used for this Storage Mover Target Endpoint

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the ID of the storage account for this Storage Mover Target Endpoint

storage_container_name.description: Specifies the name of the storage blob container for this Storage Mover Target Endpoint

storage_mover_id.description: Specifies the ID of the storage mover for this Storage Mover Target Endpoint

destination_storage_account_id.description: The ID of the destination storage account. Changing this forces a new Storage Object Replication to be created.

rules.description: One or more `rules` blocks as defined below.

rules.copy_blobs_created_after.description: The time after which the Block Blobs created will be copies to the destination. Possible values are `OnlyNewObjects`, `Everything` and time in RFC3339 format: `2006-01-02T15:04:00Z`. Defaults to `OnlyNewObjects`.

rules.filter_out_blobs_with_prefix.description: Specifies a list of filters prefixes, the blobs whose names begin with which will be replicated.

source_storage_account_id.description: The ID of the source storage account. Changing this forces a new Storage Object Replication to be created.

metadata.description: A mapping of MetaData which should be assigned to this Storage Queue.

name.description: The name of the Queue which should be created within the Storage Account. Must be unique within the storage account the queue is located

storage_account_id.description: The name of the Storage Account where the Storage Queue should be created.

storage_account_name.description: The name of the Storage Account where the Storage Queue should be created. This property is deprecated in favour of `storage_account_id`.

access_policy.expiry.description: The time at which this Access Policy should be valid untilWhen using `storage_account_id` this should be in RFC3339 format. If using the deprecated `storage_account_name` property, this uses the [ISO8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format.

access_policy.permissions.description: The permissions which should be associated with this Shared Identifier. Possible value is combination of `r` (read), `w` (write), `d` (delete), and `l` (list).

access_policy.start.description: The time at which this Access Policy should be valid from. When using `storage_account_id` this should be in RFC3339 format. If using the deprecated `storage_account_name` property, this uses the [ISO8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format.

access_tier.description: The access tier of the File Share. Possible values are `Hot`, `Cool` and `TransactionOptimized`, `Premium`.

acl.description: One or more `acl` blocks as defined below.

acl.id.description: The ID which should be used for this Shared Identifier.

enabled_protocol.description: The protocol used for the share. Possible values are `SMB` and `NFS`. The `SMB` indicates the share can be accessed by SMBv3.0, SMBv2.1 and REST. The `NFS` indicates the share can be accessed by NFSv4.1. Defaults to `SMB`

metadata.description: A mapping of MetaData for this File Share.

name.description: The name of the share. Must be unique within the storage account where the share is located

quota.description: The maximum size of the share, in gigabytes.

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the storage account in which to create the share.

storage_account_name.description: Specifies the storage account in which to create the share. This property is deprecated in favour of `storage_account_id`.

metadata.description: A mapping of metadata to assign to this Directory.

name.description: The name (or path) of the Directory that should be created within this File Share

storage_share_url.description: The Storage Share URL in which this file will be placed into

content_encoding.description: Specifies which content encodings have been applied to the file.

content_md5.description: The MD5 sum of the file contents

content_type.description: The content type of the share file. Defaults to `application/octet-stream`.

metadata.description: A mapping of metadata to assign to this file.

name.description: The name (or path) of the File that should be created within this File Share

path.description: The storage share directory that you would like the file placed into

source.description: An absolute path to a file on the local system

storage_share_url.description: The Storage Share URL in which this file will be placed into

incoming_traffic_policy.description: Incoming traffic policy. Possible values are `AllowAllTraffic` and `AllowVirtualNetworksOnly`. Defaults to `AllowAllTraffic`.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Storage Sync should exist. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Storage Sync. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync to be created.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Storage Sync should exist. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Storage Sync.

file_share_name.description: The Storage Share name to be synchronized in this Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint to be created.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Storage Account where the Storage Share exists. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint to be created.

storage_account_tenant_id.description: The Tenant ID of the Storage Account where the Storage Share exists. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint to be created. Defaults to the current tenant id.

storage_sync_group_id.description: The ID of the Storage Sync Group where this Cloud Endpoint should be created. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Cloud Endpoint to be created.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Storage Sync Group. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Group to be created.

storage_sync_id.description: The resource ID of the Storage Sync where this Storage Sync Group is. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Group to be created.

cloud_tiering_enabled.description: Is Cloud Tiering Enabled? Defaults to `false`.

initial_download_policy.description: Specifies how the server initially downloads the Azure file share data. Valid Values includes `NamespaceThenModifiedFiles`, `NamespaceOnly`, and `AvoidTieredFiles`. Defaults to `NamespaceThenModifiedFiles`

local_cache_mode.description: Specifies how to handle the local cache. Valid Values include `UpdateLocallyCachedFiles` and `DownloadNewAndModifiedFiles`. Defaults to `UpdateLocallyCachedFiles`.

name.description: The name which should be used for this Storage Sync. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Server Endpoint to be created.

registered_server_id.description: The ID of the Registered Server that will be associate with the Storage Sync Server Endpoint. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Server Endpoint to be created.

server_local_path.description: The path on the Windows Server to be synced to the Azure file share. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Server Endpoint to be created.

storage_sync_group_id.description: The ID of the Storage Sync Group where the Storage Sync Server Endpoint should exist. Changing this forces a new Storage Sync Server Endpoint to be created.

tier_files_older_than_days.description: Files older than the specified age will be tiered to the cloud.

volume_free_space_percent.description: What percentage of free space on the volume should be preserved? Defaults to `20`.

access_policy.expiry.description: The ISO8061 UTC time at which this Access Policy should be valid until.

access_policy.permissions.description: The permissions which should associated with this Shared Identifier.

access_policy.start.description: The ISO8061 UTC time at which this Access Policy should be valid from.

acl.description: One or more `acl` blocks as defined below.

acl.id.description: The ID which should be used for this Shared Identifier.

name.description: The name of the storage table. Only Alphanumeric characters allowed, starting with a letter. Must be unique within the storage account the table is located

storage_account_name.description: Specifies the storage account in which to create the storage table

entity.description: A map of key/value pairs that describe the entity to be inserted/merged in to the storage table.

partition_key.description: The key for the partition where the entity will be inserted/merged

row_key.description: The key for the row where the entity will be inserted/merged

storage_table_id.description: The Storage Share ID in which this file will be placed into.

location.description: The Azure Region where the Stream Analytics Cluster should exist

name.description: The name which should be used for this Stream Analytics Cluster

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Stream Analytics Cluster should exist

streaming_capacity.description: The number of streaming units supported by the Cluster. Accepted values are multiples of `36` in the range of `36` to `216`.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to the Stream Analytics.

input.description: One or more `input` blocks as defined below.

input.configuration_parameter.description: Is this input parameter a configuration parameter? Defaults to `false`.

input.type.description: The input data type of this JavaScript Function. Possible values include `any`, `array`, `bigint`, `datetime`, `float`, `nvarchar(max)` and `record`.

name.description: The name of the JavaScript UDA Function

output.type.description: The output data type from this JavaScript Function. Possible values include `any`, `array`, `bigint`, `datetime`, `float`, `nvarchar(max)` and `record`.

script.description: The JavaScript of this UDA Function.

stream_analytics_job_id.description: The resource ID of the Stream Analytics Job where this Function should be created

input.description: One or more `input` blocks as defined below.

input.configuration_parameter.description: Is this input parameter a configuration parameter? Defaults to `false`.

input.type.description: The Data Type for the Input Argument of this JavaScript Function. Possible values include `array`, `any`, `bigint`, `datetime`, `float`, `nvarchar(max)` and `record`.

name.description: The name of the JavaScript UDF Function

output.type.description: The Data Type output from this JavaScript Function. Possible values include `array`, `any`, `bigint`, `datetime`, `float`, `nvarchar(max)` and `record`.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Stream Analytics Job exists

script.description: The JavaScript of this UDF Function.

stream_analytics_job_name.description: The name of the Stream Analytics Job where this Function should be created

compatibility_level.description: Specifies the compatibility level for this job - which controls certain runtime behaviours of the streaming job. Possible values are `1.0`, `1.1` and `1.2`.

content_storage_policy.description: The policy for storing stream analytics content. Possible values are `JobStorageAccount`, `SystemAccount`. Defaults to `SystemAccount`.

data_locale.description: Specifies the Data Locale of the Job, which [should be a supported .NET Culture](https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/system.globalization.culturetypes(v=vs.110).aspx). Defaults to `en-US`.

events_late_arrival_max_delay_in_seconds.description: Specifies the maximum tolerable delay in seconds where events arriving late could be included. Supported range is `-1` (indefinite) to `1814399` (20d 23h 59m 59s). Default is `5`.

events_out_of_order_max_delay_in_seconds.description: Specifies the maximum tolerable delay in seconds where out-of-order events can be adjusted to be back in order. Supported range is `0` to `599` (9m 59s). Default is `0`.

events_out_of_order_policy.description: Specifies the policy which should be applied to events which arrive out of order in the input event stream. Possible values are `Adjust` and `Drop`. Default is `Adjust`.

identity.identity_ids.description: The identity id of the user assigned identity to use when type is `UserAssigned`

identity.type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity that should be configured on this Stream Analytics Job. Possible values are `SystemAssigned` and `UserAssigned`.

job_storage_account.description: The details of the job storage account. A `job_storage_account` block as defined below.

job_storage_account.account_key.description: The account key for the Azure storage account.

job_storage_account.account_name.description: The name of the Azure storage account.

job_storage_account.authentication_mode.description: The authentication mode of the storage account. Possible values are `ConnectionString` and `Msi`. Defaults to `ConnectionString`.

job_storage_account.tags.description: A mapping of tags assigned to the resource.

job_storage_account.transformation_query.description: Specifies the query that will be run in the streaming job, [written in Stream Analytics Query Language (SAQL)](https://msdn.microsoft.com/library/azure/dn834998).

location.description: The Azure Region in which the Resource Group exists

name.description: The name of the Stream Analytics Job

output_error_policy.description: Specifies the policy which should be applied to events which arrive at the output and cannot be written to the external storage due to being malformed (such as missing column values, column values of wrong type or size). Possible values are `Drop` and `Stop`. Default is `Drop`.

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Stream Analytics Job should exist

sku_name.description: The SKU Name to use for the Stream Analytics Job. Possible values are `Standard`, `StandardV2`. Defaults to `Standard`.

stream_analytics_cluster_id.description: The ID of an existing Stream Analytics Cluster where the Stream Analytics Job should run.

streaming_units.description: Specifies the number of streaming units that the streaming job uses. Supported values are `1`, `3`, `6` and multiples of `6` up to `120`. A conversion table for V2 streaming units can be found [here](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/stream-analytics/stream-analytics-streaming-unit-consumption#understand-streaming-unit-conversions-and-where-they-apply)

type.description: The type of the Stream Analytics Job. Possible values are `Cloud` and `Edge`. Defaults to `Cloud`

start_mode.description: The starting mode of the Stream Analytics Job. Possible values are `JobStartTime`, `CustomTime` and `LastOutputEventTime`.

start_time.description: The time in ISO8601 format at which the Stream Analytics Job should be started e.g. `2022-04-01T00:00:00Z`. This property can only be specified if `start_mode` is set to `CustomTime`

stream_analytics_job_id.description: The ID of the Stream Analytics Job that should be scheduled or started

authentication_mode.description: The authentication mode for the Stream Analytics Job's Storage Account. Possible values are `ConnectionString`, and `Msi`.

storage_account_key.description: The Storage Account Key for accessing the Storage Account of the Stream Analytics Job.

storage_account_name.description: The Storage Account name for the Stream Analytics Job.

stream_analytics_job_id.description: The ID of the Stream Analytics Job

name.description: The name which should be used for this Stream Analytics Managed Private Endpoint

resource_group_name.description: The name of the Resource Group where the Stream Analytics Managed Private Endpoint should exist

stream_analytics_cluster_name.description: The name of the Stream Analytics Cluster where the Managed Private Endpoint should be created

subresource_name.description: Specifies the sub resource name which the Stream Analytics Private Endpoint is able to connect to

target_resource_id.description: The ID of the Private Link Enabled Remote Resource which this Stream Analytics Private endpoint should be connected to

authentication_mode.description: The authentication mode for the Stream Output. Possible values are `Msi` and `ConnectionString`. Defaults to `ConnectionString`.

batch_max_wait_time.description: The maximum wait time per batch in `hh:mm:ss` e.g. `00:02:00` for two minutes.

batch_min_rows.description: The minimum number of rows per batch (must be between `0` and `1000000`).

blob_write_mode.description: Determines whether blob blocks are either committed automatically or appended. Possible values are `Append` and `Once`. Defaults to `Append`.

date_format.description: The date format. Wherever `{date}` appears in `path_pattern`, the value of this property is used as the date format instead.

name.description: The name of the Stream Output
